title: No Such Thing As The Metal Bloke
content:
Nish Kumar joins James, Anna and Andy to discuss The Man Who Talks With String; The Man Who Sold The World; and the man you don't want directing your B-movie.

Visit nosuchthingasafish.com for news about live shows, merchandise and more episodes.

Edited by James Harkin

Produced by Leying Lee

Team includes Jack Chambers, Tara Dorrell, Joe Mayo and Ethan Ruparelia.
